column1: You played stickball this weekend with the neighborhood kids and ended up wrenching your back and spraining your ankle.
column2: 你這個週末和鄰居小孩玩棒壘球，結果扭傷了背部和腳踝。

column1: You read a romance novel, NURSE'S TURN TO CRY, in one sitting.
column2: 你一口氣讀完了言情小說《護士的哭泣時刻》。

column1: You took a long hot bath this weekend and emerged looking like a California Raisin.
column2: 你這個週末洗了很久的熱水澡，結果看起來像加州葡萄乾。

column1: You watched a torrid romance movie, LIBRARIAN'S DILEMMA, this weekend.
column2: 你這個週末看了熾熱的言情電影《圖書館員的困境》。

column1: One of your fillings came loose this weekend. It's a good thing you're handy with a soldering iron.
column2: 你這個週末的補牙脫落了。幸好你對焊槍得心應手。

column1: You spent the weekend examining yourself under the fluorescent lights in the bathroom. Eccch!
column2: 你花了整個週末在浴室的日光燈下檢查自己。噁！

column1: You spent the weekend wondering if black holes were lit with black lights.
column2: 你花了整個週末想知道黑洞是否用黑光照亮。

column1: This weekend, you hung out at the mall, filled up on junk food, and made your mother ashamed of you.
column2: 這個週末，你在購物中心閒晃、吃滿了垃圾食品，讓你媽為你感到羞恥。

column1: You went bowling with friends this weekend.
column2: 你這個週末和朋友去打保齡球。

column1: You played two rounds of golf this weekend.
column2: 你這個週末打了兩輪高爾夫。

column1: This weekend, you had to bail your nephew out of jail.
column2: 這個週末，你得把侄子從牢裡保釋出來。

column1: You had your marble repainted this weekend.
column2: 你這個週末把你的彈珠重新粉刷了。

column1: You played in a volleyball tournament this weekend.
column2: 你這個週末參加了排球錦標賽。

column1: You took a friend out to an expensive restaurant this weekend.
column2: 你這個週末帶朋友去了高級餐廳用餐。

column1: You went to San Diego to play in the Over The Line Tournament.
column2: 你去聖地牙哥參加了越線錦標賽。

column1: You went to Las Vegas in a $20,000 car and came back in a $200,000 Greyhound bus.
column2: 你開著兩萬美元的車去拉斯維加斯，卻坐著二十萬美元的灰狗巴士回來。

column1: You tried to drive to Hawaii to watch a surfing contest.
column2: 你試著開車去夏威夷觀看衝浪比賽。

column1: You went scuba diving in La Jolla.
You went deep sea fishing this weekend.
column2: 你這個週末去深海釣魚。

column1: You volunteered to take the local scouts to Disneyland.
column2: 你自願帶當地的童子軍去迪士尼樂園。

column1: You drove the senior citizens' bus this weekend and they drove you - crazy.
column2: 你這個週末開著銀髮族的巴士，他們讓你發瘋。

column1: You helped several little old ladies cross the street to get to their aerobics class.
column2: 你幫幾位老太太過馬路去上有氧課程。

column1: You visited a sick friend in the hospital. REALLY!
column2: 你去醫院探望了生病的朋友。真的！
